title: MCIRCO 24-Piece Glass Food Storage Containers with Snap Locking Lids, Glass Meal Prep Containers Set, Airtight Lunch Containers, Microwave, Oven,Freezer and Dishwasher Friendly
features: 24 PIECE FOOD CONTAINER SET: 12 Containers with 12 lids with multiple sizes and shapes to fulfill your storage requirement. Package includes: 1 (35.5 oz), 1 (22 oz) 2 (12.5oz ) 1 (27 oz) 1 (17.6 oz) 2 (11.2 oz) 1 (32 oz) 1 (20.1 oz) 2 (13.5 oz) container with lids
PREMIUM GLASS:Our glass storage containers are made from premium borosilicate glass, which is stronger and can adjust to temperature changes much better than cheaper glass food storage containers

AIRTIGHT SMART-LOCKING LIDS: MCIRCO Glass food storage containers use snap lock lids that comes with silicone seals to ensure your meal prep food will last much longer than normal plastic food storage containers. These lids are easy to use and will stop leaking. These lids will not break or slowly stop working

USER FRIENDLY: Easy to use and easy to take care of, as it’s microwave, freezer and dishwasher friendly, and oven friendly for over 500 degrees Fahrenheit. Take off the lids before placing in oven and microwave
SPACE-SAVING: The food storage containers have stackable design, can keep refrigerator, home and kitchen organized, and leave more space on your kitchen slabs and cabinets
description: Product Description 24 PCS WITH VARIOUS SIZES, MEET ALL YOUR NEEDS. This Package Include: 1 Piece of 1050ml/35.5oz Rectangular food glass container 1 Piece of 650ml/22oz Rectangular food glass container 2 Pieces of 370ml/12.5oz Rectangular food glass container 1 Piece of 800ml/27oz Square food glass container 1 Piece of 520ml/17.6oz Square food glass container 2 Pieces of 330ml/11.2oz Square food glass container 1 Piece of 950ml/32oz Round food glass container 1 Piece of 620ml/20.1oz Round food glass container 2 Pieces of 400ml/13.5oz Round food glass container Tip: The rubber seal was designed to removed from the lids for washing conveniently, so if the seal falls apart, please put it back. Product Features Multi capacity Borosilicate Glass Upgraded Plastic Snap Locking Lids with Silicone Seal Microwave, Oven, Freezer, Dishwasher Friendly Please wash the containers and lids upon arrival to protect the seal from sticking to the container. Borosilicate Glass Made from borosilicate glass, these containers are fridge and freezer friendly down to -4℉, oven friendly up to 1040℉ and microwave friendly. No Leaking The lid snaps closed to lock in liquids and maintain freshness, good for packing lunches or taking on the go. Easy Storage They nest and stack neatly, which helps conserve precious space in your cabinets, fridge or freezer. Easy to Clean These food storage containers are smooth, it won't absorb stains or odors from food, easy to wash by hand or in the dishwasher without chips or cracks appearing out of the blue.
